# Institution / Company Entry Template

Use this schema for entries in `docs/maps/academia.md` and `docs/maps/industry.md`.

| Field | What to include |
|---|---|
| Name | Institution, lab, or company name |
| Type | University lab, institute, startup, platform company, robotics company |
| Stack focus | Perception, state, policy, interaction, learning loop, deployment |
| Bias | Algorithm, system, hardware, platform |
| What to watch | The line of work that best represents this node |
| Representative work | 2-5 papers, systems, datasets, or product lines |
| Official links | Homepage, lab page, project page, code page |
| Tracking reason | Why this node matters in the ecosystem |

## Researcher Watchlist Mini Schema

| Field | What to include |
|---|---|
| Name | Scholar name |
| Institution | Main current anchor |
| Main line | Short phrase such as `robot learning`, `VLA`, `grasping`, `world models` |
| Representative hooks | 2-3 memorable works, labs, or systems |
| Why track | Why the person matters for this atlas |
